title: SpatialOmics CODEX analysis

title: 2  Test 1 - Nathalie Feb 26
text: 3 Analysis of the CODEX data from Nathalie Test_1

title: 2  Test 1 - Nathalie Feb 26
text:
3.1 Configuration and package loading
library(reticulate)
use_condaenv("sopa", required = TRUE)
Import Package


Show code
# import the python packages
import scanpy as sc
import spatialdata as sd
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import h5py
import anndata as ad
import spatialdata_io as sio
import spatialdata_plot
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import warnings
import os
import squidpy as sq

warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")


Read Data


Show code
adata_all = sc.read_h5ad("/home/paul.marcoux/Postdoc/Python/sopa/workflow/data/Nathalie_test/processed/adata_merged_leiden_0_5.h5ad")

Import Package


Show code

import spatialdata as sd
import pandas as pd

Read Data


Show code
